name: SHORT EXPIRY - CLEARANCE: Bonnie Adult Dog Food - Lamb and Rice 15kg
shortDescription: Give your dog the goodness of nature with Bonnie Lamb & Rice Adult Dog Food. This tasty, balanced recipe blends tender lamb with rice to provide essential nutrients that keep your dog active, healthy, and happy perfect for adult dogs of every size and breed.
